a:5:{s:2:"id";a:9:{s:11:"column_name";s:2:"id";s:14:"column_default";N;s:9:"data_type";s:15:"bigint unsigned";s:11:"is_nullable";b:0;s:16:"ordinal_position";i:1;s:7:"comment";s:0:"";s:5:"extra";s:14:"auto_increment";s:3:"key";s:3:"PRI";s:10:"privileges";s:31:"select,insert,update,references";}s:4:"code";a:10:{s:4:"type";s:6:"string";s:11:"column_name";s:4:"code";s:14:"column_default";N;s:9:"data_type";s:7:"varchar";s:11:"is_nullable";b:0;s:16:"ordinal_position";i:2;s:7:"comment";s:0:"";s:5:"extra";s:0:"";s:3:"key";s:3:"UNI";s:10:"privileges";s:31:"select,insert,update,references";}s:11:"is_disabled";a:9:{s:11:"column_name";s:11:"is_disabled";s:14:"column_default";s:1:"0";s:9:"data_type";s:7:"tinyint";s:11:"is_nullable";b:1;s:16:"ordinal_position";i:3;s:7:"comment";s:0:"";s:5:"extra";s:0:"";s:3:"key";s:0:"";s:10:"privileges";s:31:"select,insert,update,references";}s:10:"created_at";a:9:{s:11:"column_name";s:10:"created_at";s:14:"column_default";N;s:9:"data_type";s:8:"datetime";s:11:"is_nullable";b:0;s:16:"ordinal_position";i:4;s:7:"comment";s:0:"";s:5:"extra";s:0:"";s:3:"key";s:0:"";s:10:"privileges";s:31:"select,insert,update,references";}s:10:"updated_at";a:9:{s:11:"column_name";s:10:"updated_at";s:14:"column_default";N;s:9:"data_type";s:8:"datetime";s:11:"is_nullable";b:1;s:16:"ordinal_position";i:5;s:7:"comment";s:0:"";s:5:"extra";s:0:"";s:3:"key";s:0:"";s:10:"privileges";s:31:"select,insert,update,references";}}
